title: Russell Hobbs RH00855EU Vermont Cutlery Set – 20 Piece Stainless Steel Tableware With Steak Knives, Service For 4 People, Dishwasher Safe, Knives/Forks/Dessert Spoons/Teaspoons, 15 Year Guarantee
features: Adding an elegant touch to your dining table, this 20 piece Vermont Cutlery Set from Russell Hobbs boast a classic, timeless design.
Tableware to accommodate four people, this cutlery set is complete with forks, knives, steak knives, dessert spoons and teaspoons.
This stainless steel cutlery set is incredibly durable and conveniently dishwasher safe for a quick and easy clean up after use.
Featuring serrated edge steak knives that will effortlessly cut through meat, the cutlery is a must-have to complete your dining ware.
Designed with a pleasant weight, this finely balanced flatware set is comfortable and easy to handle, perfect for using everyday.
description: Product Description Russell Hobbs Cutlery Ideal for new home owners or to simply compliment your dinnerware, these cutlery sets from Russell Hobbs make a sophisticated and timeless addition to your home. Including knives, forks, tablespoons and teaspoons, this luxurious sets are completed with a stainless steel 18/0 mirror finish; perfect for families or for use by guests. Expertly crafted, the sets have also been designed to be dishwasher safe, making tidying up after meals quick and easy. Previous page Stainless Steel Crafted from strong stainless steel, you can expect high-quality cutlery Easy Clean Easily tidy away after dinner with these cutlery sets - simply wash in the dishwasher. Designs With both traditional and modern designs to choose from, these sets can suit every home. Cutlery Sets Choose between the London, Vienna, Vermont, and Geometric styles. Long-Lasting To be eligible for extended cover, register your product online within 30 days of purchase.
